{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322015227DD681F2F85645B62B38E"}"},"total":1099},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611902031239594776","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看！女主有气绝不受张嘴就骂回去爽死了，弟弟完全姐控来的，弟弟和女主还是龙凤胎，在弟弟眼里他说＂爱商姎是本能，他们之间的羁绊和商家其他人根本不能混作一谈，他们俩才是真正意义上的血脉相连，是彼此最重要的人。＂我真的是大磕特磕[舔屏]，而且大大文笔超好，任何人错过这么好看的书我真会心痛的！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772286516,"group_id":"7535337389883935768","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9Ro+G/a5lMC390+h7a+f2Y=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5c9aff4a25ad4d78bc4b3e5e67723122~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704605&x-signature=GgxFgUPatyWEhJkOakHt9pS3q6M%3D","user_id":"105838896541","user_name":"江无兮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"105838896541","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7535337389883935768","book_info":{"abstract":"【沙雕+团宠+发疯+豪门群像+爽文】
（全文不含腐，搞笑情节勿认真，介意勿入。
建议不带脑观看～）
穿书成为有钱有颜无脑反派，商姎怒了。
为什么反派还要上学啊？！！
有钱不就应该躺平享受美好人生吗？
更过分的是好不容易穿成有钱人，小说原结局居然因为蠢哥哥和笨弟弟爱上女主被男主整家破人亡了！
商姎恨铁不成钢，骂天骂地骂所有人，打算给这些不食人间烟火的有钱人们开启强防御计划：
冷漠无情的霸总大哥喜欢女主让他的生活不再单调是吧，商姎天天闯祸四处惹事让他忙的焦头烂额，好好充实充实！
俊朗腹黑的少校二哥喜欢女主像小兔子一样可爱是吧，商姎直接给他屋里养一窝兔子，让他闻兔子便便味闻到爽！
花心臭屁的明星三哥喜欢女主没苦硬吃的坚韧形象是吧，商姎直接把他踹到种地综艺里去天天种地，让他吃苦吃到爽！
冷僻孤傲的天才弟弟被小太阳女主打动是吧，“小太阳”取暖器在线为你服务，暖到你想到这三个字就害怕！
而她自己，为了逃脱坐牢被凌虐致死的结局，当然是要离男女主有多远就多远。
谁别想来影响她的豪门富贵生活！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9fb26bd0ebac7accd8f3b3bc3a6051ba","author":"九拾九分","author_id":"","book_id":"7535337389883935768","book_name":"穿书反派，我比格属性爆发","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#682828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"48.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":748,"name":"豪门总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=748&name=豪门总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7598888181810856472","read_count":"481968","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"263657"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"125","tags":"豪门总裁,现代言情,团宠,穿书,搞笑轻松,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b6c482b3635d7d5f1a4252ed2177d863~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779299548&x-signature=qxxPVcsYHpIkYLK8tNjL0pQzGfI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"470193645304856","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"107"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322015227DD681F2F85645B62B38E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":431,"forwarded_count":0,"
